top_signals.title: Iran suspends peace talks and threatens ‘closure’ of Strait of Hormuz
top_signals.summary: Tehran escalates tensions to protest Israeli offensive in Lebanon
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: ECB appoints three Directors General
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Nvidia, Meta and Schlumberger rank among top companies in adopting AI, new study says
top_signals.summary: The AI-Driven Enterprise Institute released new research that breaks down the degree to which S&P 500 companies are adopting AI compared with their peers.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Non-Executive Directors of the National Wealth Fund reappointed
top_signals.summary: Nigel Topping, Tania Songini and Marianne Økland have been reappointed as Non-Executive Directors of the National Wealth Fund (NWF).
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: Ukraine Turns the Tide
top_signals.summary: Why a cease-fire is now a real possibility.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Netherlands Seizes 800 Servers, Arrests 2 for Aiding Cyberattacks
top_signals.summary: Authorities in the Netherlands have arrested the co-owners of two related Internet hosting companies for operating IT infrastructure used by Russia to carry out cyberattacks, influence operations and disinformation campaigns inside the European Union. The two men were the focus of a 2025 KrebsOnSecurity story about how their hosting companies had assumed control over the technical infrastructure of Stark Industries Solutions, an Internet service provider sanctioned last year by the EU as a frequent staging ground for cyber mischief from Russia's intelligence agencies.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Guidance: Preston guidance: April 2026
top_signals.summary: Preston factors (earnings and interest factors) are provided for employers.

top_signals.title: The new king of The Ring of Fire? Robert Cudney’s big bet
top_signals.summary: With nearly half the camp under its control, Juno is advancing gold and critical mineral discoveries at scale.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: ’AI simply can’t replicate it’: Japan embraces zine trend
top_signals.summary: Independent artist and writers have been turning ever more to self-published or handmade small print publications, reflecting a love of paper in the digital era.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Cruise giant Carnival confirms data breach affecting nearly 6 million people
top_signals.summary: The company said the threat actor gained access to a limited portion of its IT environment last month after compromising an employee account. By the end of April, Carnival determined that the attacker had copied personal information from its systems.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
